text: Our experience with Sehee was fun and a true dream come true! We met at a great location and started right on time. She is personable, has a great sense of humor, even at 6 am, and knew all the great photo spots in the area! It felt like our own personal tour of Dumbo while taking pictures. Her eye for beautiful and eye catching photo locations and her guidance made us look AMAZING in our pictures. Even my husband enjoyed the experience!! Our photos and editing style are timeless, romantic, and we've received so many compliments. The next time we visit NYC we will use Sehee again and so should you! Trust us, you won't regret your experience with her.
name: Annica Baker

text: 5++ out of 5 stars! I recently had a 1-hour shoot in Soho with Sehee, and the experience was everything and more because of her creativity and expertise in photography. This was our second time working together, and even just her artistic direction and location recommendations (for nice backgrounds and beautiful lighting) were well worth it. Sehee is so friendly, thoughtful, professional, and carries a positive energy that led to another fun shoot. She sent over the gallery super quickly — I love how her photos stand out for their snapshots-from-a-movie feel that comes with her background in cinematography. I would most definitely recommend her work!!
name: Wendy Sy

text: Sehee was lovely to shoot with. She was excellent at inspiring candid moments, as well as giving us direction for posed shots. She made us feel very comfortable and supported through the experience. She has a wonderful eye and is a skilled photographer. Highly recommend!
name: Amelia Laughlin

text: I can't rave about Sehee enough. We first worked with her last year for holiday photos for our family when our little one was an infant and we received so many compliments from friends and family about our portraits! We loved her work so much that she was our top choice for family photos again this year. She arrives early to scout out the location and find the absolute best spots for the photos. She has an incredible eye and an ability to make people at ease and capture their essence and personality through the photos - and with a 17-month old, this is not an easy task! I love the way she uses natural light to illuminate our faces and makes the photos look almost like paintings. I would definitely recommend her for any occasion and she'll always be our favorite family photographer!
name: Alexi Noelle

text: Sehee's photoshoot was an engagement gift, that I have received 4 hours prior to the photoshoot. I had no time to style my hair, to prepare the outfits and to think about logistics. On top of that I work in marketing and I've been working with the best photographers in NYC, so my standards of photography is very-very high. I am so thankful to my fiancé for this gift and for choosing Sehee. Her personality and professionalism were able to make us feel ourselves and relaxed in front of the camera. It was our first photoshoot as a couple and I cannot be happier with the results: just in 2 hours we were able to get stunning photos where our love was captured in one of the most beautiful cities in the world. I will absolutely recommend Sehee. Take at least 3 hours. And think about the locations you'd like to have a photoshoot in advance. The hard part is to choose which photos we will print out :) Thanks Sehee and Matt for the perfect day and memories!
name: Victoria & Matt Azzara

text: Finding Sehee and having the opportunity to work with her is hands down one of the highlights and best choices I have made in 2020. I found her via Yelp. After reviewing her work and reading all about the rave reviews from previous clients, I knew that I could trust her to capture the look and feel of the photoshoot that I was looking for. I reached out to her and she responded immediately. She's incredibly communicative, responsive, professional, and considerate. She asks questions and ensures that she truly understands what you're looking for, what your needs are for your photoshoot, and brings ideas to the table, which is incredibly helpful if you're shooting in an area or neighborhood that isn't familiar to you. She's also really willing to listen to your ideas and find ways to embrace them and incorporate them into your photo shoot. Like so many others in 2020, I lost my job which in turn resulted in me losing my housing and caused my family and I to pack up and quickly move across the country in the middle of the pandemic. It had been a while since my partner and I had regular seasonal photoshoots, something I think is important and worth investing in, but with everything that was happening in the middle of the pandemic, it was important to me to create some beautiful and lasting memories in the middle of all the hurt, loss, and pain. Sehee was the right person to help me capture those moments and create some long-lasting stunning shots that I will look at fondly for years to come and remember that there were also some beautiful moments in the middle of the chaos. Sehee showed up early, ready to work, and took the necessary precautions to shoot us safely and comfortably in the middle of the pandemic. I felt very safe and comfortable working with her. She really took her time and ensured that every moment was captured perfectly and didn't rush the work. She is also communicative on posing, lighting, getting angles, and waiting for foot/bike traffic and making it appear you're alone in the middle of a major city. I communicated to Sehee that I was looking for a golden hour early morning photoshoot in Brooklyn and DUMBO and boy did she deliver. She captured and delivered stunning, golden hour, JJ Abrams photos that captured intimacy and romance like poetry. All of the shots and locations that I was looking to shoot at, she made sure to keep us on track and moving along so we had plenty of time at each location and didn't feel rushed at all. I got my photos quickly after and I'm obsessed with every single shot. If you're looking for a photographer in the NYC area, definitely reach out to Sehee. She has great customer service, communicates quickly and clearly, and knows how to capture the look and feel of what you're looking for. You won't be disappointed.
name: Ashley Lin

text: Sehee is a true magician and highly professional and organized photographer. We had already 3 shoots together (engagement, maternity, friend and family) and every time the result is above expectations. A hint for the magazine-like results: research poses in advance, bring few outfits and send to Sehee your desired outcome. Her videos are also stunning. So it's up to you if you want glam, romantic, model/fashion, New York memories etc - Sehee is the right choice. Highly recommended.
name: Victoria Rogulska

text: Sehee was so much fun to work with, and she has such a great eye. We love the way our photos turned out!
name: Kelley Louise

text: I was looking for a photographer for my parents' 35th wedding anniversary dinner, and I picked Sehee as our photographer after reviewing multiple reviews and portfolios. I also loved that she was Korean, which I knew would make communication between her and my folks easy... and I was right! Sehee made the whole experience enjoyable despite ridiculously cold and windy weather the day of the shoot. Sehee was responsive, made my parents feel comfortable, and came with a plan. She has a sharp and artistic eye for beautiful and 'hipster cool' photos. I can't wait to see the expression on my folks' faces when they see how amazing the pictures came out. Thank you again, Sehee!
name: Ester Park

text: Sehee was fantastic, had great ideas, listen to what we wanted and the photos turned out BEAUTIFUL
name: Ariela Trepman

text: She was amazing! The pictures turned out beautiful even though the day was windy, Sehee worked with it so well!
name: Megan McMaster

text: We loved shooting with Sehee! She was very helpful and easygoing. She had great ideas for each location and was also great about giving us direction to make for the best pictures. They turned out even better than we had expected and they are pictures that our family will always cherish. We will definitely be working with her again the next time we are in town.
name: Krystl Vest

text: Sehee was so kind!!! I sent her some photos i wanted to recreate! She knew the exact locations and feasibility of being able to take the shot, timing-wise! She was open to ideas. We felt so comfortable with Sehee, and she gave us pose instructions which really helped because we were clueless in that department. We got the shots and backgrounds we wanted! and the pictures came out clear and beautiful.
name: Joanne Kim

text: I've hired Sehee twice now, and she's been amazing. She can capture gorgeous photos regardless of the setting. She's creative and very talented. She's also friendly and so easy to talk to. She was very open to our ideas and made us all feel very comfortable. I'd hire her again in a heartbeat!
name: Danielle Trudeau

text: I am so thankful to have found Sehee for our family's first photoshoot! Our family was taking a short trip to NY and I really wanted to capture this moment together and Sehee was so amazing to work with! She made the whole photoshoot for my family very easy and fun. All of us can be awkward in front of a camera but Sehee was able to make us feel comfortable and made all of the photos looks amazing and natural! My whole family had such a great time and couldn't stop raving about her talent! When I say ALL of the photos came out amazing, I really mean it! If you are looking for a photographer that truly spend the time with your family to create beautiful pictures, definitely reach out to Sehee! She is so wonderful to work with and I can't wait to take a trip up to NY again to take photos with Sehee! Thank you Sehee for the amazing photos!!! My family loved meeting you and shooting in NY with you!
name: Ellen Park

text: Wow, I cannot recommend Sehee enough! She shot my surprise proposal and a subsequent engagement photoshoot and the photos are incredible. She is not only an amazing photographer but an incredible person too - we loved shooting with Sehee and she has the skills, knowledge, and patience to get every shot you're looking for! Check her portfolio out on Instagram and her website. No need to look any further - you'd typically pay twice the price for such a talented photographer. PS Schedule a shoot for golden hour at Dumbo Brooklyn - you won't regret it :)
name: Ron Chang

text: Sehee Kim is not only a sweet soul, she makes you feel extremely at home and comfortable when shooting with her. I genuinely felt like I was at my best state of mind when shooting with Sehee, she was very creative, attentive, and focused throughout the whole shoot, she really helped me bring life to my photos with her positivity. Thank you so much for this wonderful opportunity Sehee, your work is amazing and so are you!
name: Chloe Rene

text: We hired Sehee to shoot our elopement at our church and couldn't be more thrilled with her work! We never planned to elope, but found ourselves having to replan our whole wedding since family couldn't travel to NYC because of COVID. I had a hard time finding a photographer for a short amount time that we trusted to capture the most important hour of our lives so far. After a few hours of searches/portfolios, I came across Sehee's stand out work and wanted to hire her. I'm so glad we did! She's really responsive and communicative, making it easy to schedule. Once we had everything set, we appreciate that she took time to scout out the location in advanced and research poses for our portraits. She really went above and beyond in prep! On the day of, she did a great job directing us and making us feel comfortable getting our picture taken. Neither of us are very experienced in getting our picture taken, so her instructions were really helpful! Once the ceremony was underway, she captured so many moments from so many different angles. When we got our pictures, we were blown away, not only by her skills, but also that she was able to provide so many of our special moments that we will treasure forever. We highly recommend!
name: Melissa Mock

text: Sehee is a gem and I feel so lucky to have found her! I don't normally leave reviews but I have to in this case. I booked her for my engagement shoot and she did an amazing job! My husband and I don't normally like taking pictures, but Sehee was kind and professional AND directed us through the entire shoot. The photos came back GORGEOUS, so I HAD to book her for my wedding as well. She is top quality and worked hard the entire night to capture her shots. I am SO pleased with the photos we got back. I HIGHLY recommend her! She was easy to work with and one of the highlights of my entire wedding experience. I can't wait to book her again as my family expands, as she is now my go to for photography.
name: Teyahna Pridgen

text: Sehee was incredibly sweet, reliable, patient and now that I've just received my pictures I can confirm incredibly talented as well! I did a photo shoot in Central Park with my family, my brother's family and my parents as a birthday present for my mom. We have 4 kids altogether between ages 1-6 and my husband who could barely sit because he had recently gotten surgery. She didn't get frustrated once trying to get everyone to look AND smile and somehow she succeeded in getting MANY incredible shots with everyone looking and smiling! Even my mom who's very critical is extremely happy with all the great pics! I particularly loved that Sehee sent a questionnaire beforehand asking who's going to be in the pictures (ages, etc), did we want candids or posed, what our main goal was with this shoot - and it was clear she REALLY listened to what I said. I would absolutely recommend Sehee and can't wait to use her again myself for our future family shoots!
name: Gloria Masri

text: Sehee was an absolute dream to work with! Not only does she have an incredible creative eye behind the lens, but she is also a kind and comforting guide when creating the moments to capture. I could not recommend Sehee more highly. She made us feel so comfortable in front of the camera and captured photos we couldn't have even dreamed of. Incredibly talented, professional, and friendly. If you're looking for a perfect photographer, go with Sehee!
name: Eric Jaugey

text: We are so happy we were able to secure Sehee for our couple's photoshoot in Central Park! Although neither of us are very comfortable in front of a camera, Sehee's understanding of light and space and her incredible work in post-processing/production make every shot look gorgeous. We don't know how she does it, but the results speak for themselves: every scene looks straight out of a storybook, crisp and with a tinge of nostalgic atmosphere, but without looking washed out or sacrificing any of the vibrancy of the colors, the way some post-processing can. Even though the light was fading in the forested areas where we wanted to take photos at the time of our shoot, Sehee made it work. For making us look far, far better than we could ever look ourselves, bravo - and thank you!
name: Erin Harpst

text: Sehee captured my family of four beautifully and thoughtfully. She is extraordinarily professional and has a real eye for photography. Her direction during the shoot really helped to compose our shots. And as a result, Sehee managed to make our posed photos seem much more natural and effortless. Within our 60 minute session, Sehee photographed us in a variety of settings. There was no time wasted! As soon as we were done in one location, we were on to the next. She made the most of our time together in a very efficient manner. I would absolutely work with Sehee again in the future. We have photos to cherish for a lifetime!
name: Kate Greenwood

text: My fiancé and I had an hour with Sehee on Monday evening and she was simply amazing! Sehee has a great eye for angles, light and composition and more importantly, she has a beautiful personality. She is down-to-earth and made us feel at ease even though this was our first professional photoshoot and were rather awkward. Sehee's turnaround was super fast and she sent the photos across today! That's less than 3 working days. The results were simply magical as she made us look natural and beautiful in the photos. Super grateful to Sehee for immortalizing our engagement. Love the photos and have recommended her to my other friends coming to New York :)
name: Qin Lei Tan

text: We have a tradition to have family photo shooting when we go on a trip. We researched photographers in New York City online and found Sehee really fits the style we were looking for for the city photo shooting. It may be coincidence, we had one friend share her photographer info when she was in NYC because we liked her fashion photos very much. It turned out to be Sehee too! We really like the airy, clean, clear feeling of Sehee's photos and the color tone. Sehee is good at telling us how to pose in front of camera, she's also patient with my daughter's pose requests. I were lucky to have her in our NYC trip and leave such beautiful memory.
name: Raymond Wang

text: Sehee captured my surprise proposal in New York. Not only did the photos come out amazing, but she also helped brainstorm about the location, the scenario and everything. Both my girlfriend and I aren't really photogenic, but Sehee guided us through the poses and captured it beautifully. Thanks for everything Sehee!
name: Sheng Lin

text: Sehee was incredible! She was very responsive and easy to communicate with. Additionally, she was helpful in accommodating changes in our travel plans and scheduling based on the weather. Sehee made us feel very comfortable and at ease during our session, giving us plenty of direction but also allowing us to get creative when it felt right. Our pictures turned out amazing! She made us look great while capturing the spirit of our trip. Her turn around time was quick. Sehee is your best option for a photographer in NYC! I would 100% book with Sehee again.
name: Lesley Miller

text: Sehee was amazing! She very flexible to work with us during a surprise proposal, which can be hard to plan to the exact minute. When we did meet up, she was able to work with our suggestions but also had some really great ideas that made our photo shoot incredible. I would recommend her to anyone, she was that good!
name: Ryan Percy

text: If you are searching for a photographer, look no further! My friends and I had such a wonderful experience with Sehee. She made the whole experience so fun and went above and beyond my expectations. Also she had the photos to me in such a short amount of time! She will be the first person I call for photo needs in the city
name: Samantha Stack

text: Shooting with Sehee was amazing! She made us feel so comfortable on our engagement shoot and had such a great eye for the perfect shot. Her creative direction skills were on point. She picked out a lot of beautiful locations for us and even stayed a little later than we booked her for to shoot some photos of us with the sunset. I definitely recommend Sehee and will definitely keep her in mind for any of my upcoming photo shoots.
name: Aurora Pfeiffer

text: Sehee was amazing!! She was super flexible when we needed to change the time of our shoot and very understanding of some last minute conflicts that came up. She managed to get some amazing shots of us all, including my 7 month old who is not always easy to photograph. She is extremely talented and in my opinion booking her at her rate is a great deal considering her level of talent.
name: Allyson Rester

text: Sehee was incredible. She was both patient and so pleasant. This was our first family shoot with our baby and I couldn't have been happier with not only the pictures, but the experience. 12/10 recommend working with her.
name: Rachel Rollar

text: Sehee was amazing! As a photographer myself, I was really excited to get to see her in action. She knew the best spots. Definitely TRUST HER JUDGEMENT! I'm obsessed with all our photos and will send anyone else traveling to NYC straight to her!
name: Michelle Leach

text: Experience with Sehee was absolutely extraordinary. Sehee was responsive, thoughtful, creative, and was an incredible guide throughout the process. I booked her for my surprise proposal and she made the experience incredibly seamless. The photos were turned around quickly, and turned out perfectly. I highly recommend. Thank you to everyone involved.
name: Freeman Lewin

text: Sehee is a great conversationalist, a cool person, and a patient photoshoot director. My boyfriend and I are so happy with our pictures. If we come back to New York and want more pictures, she is definitely the first person we will reach out to. Thank you, Sehee!
name: Logan Liu

text: Sehee is incredibly talented, fun to work with, and so patient! We absolutely loved the work she did for us but most importantly how patient she was with our dog. She even had a squeak toy to grab his attention. 10/10 recommendation for your next family photo shoot or any shoot for that matter! Thank you Sehee!!
name: Jesseca Torres

text: She was the perfect photographer for our NYC shoot. We found her by chance for our 25th anniversary trip and we are so glad we did. She is knowledgeable of great spots to shoot, easy to work with, and has just the right eye for capturing your shoot. If we could give more than 5 stars we would. I would highly recommend her for any photo/video needs that you have.
name: Adam Harris

text: Sehee is AMAZING! I have a six month old baby and wanted to do a family photoshoot at a local community garden with baby, my husband, and myself. Sehee was super responsive and reasonably priced, and when it rained the day-of, she and I texted back and forth as we watched the weather and coordinated the shoot NOT ONLY with the rain but with the baby's nap schedule. In less than an hour she got dozens of really beautiful, authentic, and natural-looking photos. I love her original style - it really captured our family perfectly and she was a pleasure to work with.
name: Hannah Thurman

text: We did a newborn photoshoot with Sehee and LOVE the photos! Great mix of portraits in different settings, candid and posed. Posed shots look natural, sweet family photos without being cheesy. We shot in our apartment and outside, all turned out great, beautiful lighting. We had a good time during the shoot - Sehee was really nice, made us feel relaxed. She did a great job of guiding the shoot, but also asked us what we wanted in advance and on the day. I am already planning on hiring her again for baby's first birthday! :) Would highly recommend!
name: Amy MacKinnon

text: Sehee was wonderful! She communicated with me ahead of the shoot about different styles and poses we could try, which shows how thoughtful she is. On the day of our pictures, she arrived early to scout out the best spots in the park and made us feel so comfortable. Her composition and use of light are amazing. We are so happy with the end result and can't wait to work with her again in the future!
name: Alexi Noelle

text: Sehee was awesome!!! She played like a bystander and I asked her to take a picture of me and my girlfriend. She played along and I turned around and got down on a knee and asked my girlfriend to marry me. She got the moment I asked and everything.
name: Nicholas Popovic

text: Sehee was incredible! She directed us, made everyone feel comfortable, was very efficient and the pictures turned out gorgeous! Would highly recommend capturing your special moments with her!
name: Jaqueline Shafeei

text: Sehee is amazing. She has an amazing eye for locations to photograph and her clear directions made it an easy and seamless experience for us. We love all our photos!

text: Sehee was great - easy and quick to communicate, really flexible, and also came with lots of ideas. I felt really confident that we were in good hands. The photos came out amazing! We were new to this and didn't provide a lot of direction (we could have been better at that!) - but Sehee still managed to get a ton of variety, so that we came out with ones we really like. The composition and lighting of her photos is incredible - she does such an amazing job incorporating cool backgrounds, which we wanted since it was an NYC wedding and we wanted it to feel that way.

text: We had such a great experience with Sehee. Our family is not particularly at ease with a camera, but she quickly provided suggestions, while at the same time always listening to our ideas. The hour we had with her was very enjoyable, and productive!

text: We had a wonderful time taking picture with Sehee in DUMBO and the images are lovely. Additionally she was great with our 10 month old and got some really amazing and adorable shots of him despite his wiggles and occasional crankiness. Thank you Sehee!

text: Sehee did an amazing job with my photos! She understood my vision and helped me pick outfits beforehand. They turned out amazing and it was a fun activity to do as a solo traveler.

text: Sehee was sweet, flexible and amazing to work with! She made us feel very comfortable in front of the camera and gave clear instructions and guidance. text: We loved Sehee! My husband hates having his picture taken and she made it so easy! We also felt incredibly safe having to navigate through the mandates surrounding the pandemic. Would definitely shoot with her again, we loved our photos!

text: Sehee was 10/10 incredible. She made us feel at ease, knew exactly what we were looking for, and took the lead directing us and advising what looked good. Our pictures are perfect. Thank you Sehee!!

text: I'm so glad we chose Sehee as our photographer. She did everything just right. As a photographer myself I was a little concerned about not getting the shoot just as I thought. If you are taking photographs in DUMBO, Sehee is the BEST.

text: Our photographer, Sehee was fantastic! She is professional, communicative, and captured beautiful photos. She is also just overall the type of person you'd like to hang out with! text: I am amazed by Sehee's work :) Sehee is an extremely talented photographer and videographer. She takes her time to set the frame and captures the perfect moments. Sehee was our photographer for 2 days at 2 different locations in NYC. She did a splendid job. We would definitely recommend her.

text: Sehee was amazing! Prompt, attentive, efficient, and got all the perfect shots. She captured exactly what we were wanting for our first trip to NYC. Would absolutely recommend!

text: I had an amazing photoshoot with Sehee this autumn! She is a talented photographer with a huge experience in what she does. Easy-going, friendly, focused. One of my best pictures so far. Highly recommend that studio!

text: Sehee was very professional and friendly. My 2 year old daughter is usually shy with people she doesn't know but she did so well that day. Her photos were beautiful!

We don't know how she does it, but the results speak for themselves: every scene looks straight out of a storybook, crisp and with a tinge of nostalgic atmosphere, but without looking washed out or sacrificing any of the vibrancy of the colors, the way some post-processing can. For making us look far, far better than we could ever look ourselves, bravo - and thank you!

text: Sehee was amazing. She showed up with a clear plan for our session, gave great direction and the photos totally exceeded our expectations. She is clearly an experienced photographer who will make the most of your time together. She was flexible in dealing with scheduling and made us look great despite it being almost 100 degrees. Cant recommend and thank her enough!

text: Not gonna lie, I was skeptical. Not because of the photographer, but because my two year old would not stop screaming!! Sehee was awesome picking just the right shots and timing and our pictures turned out so great! Could not be more pleased! She was also so flexible with us and wasn't even phased by our super grumpy little one. Awesome, awesome!

text: Sehee is a real artist. She is also so professional, positive and easy-going person. It was easy and pleasant to work with Sehee. I think it was my best photo shoot so far. I would definitely recommend Sehee to my friends.

text: My partner and I hired and asked Sehee to capture our wedding dinner celebration with friends at a local restaurant in Brooklyn. When we first met the day of the event, I had the impression of Sehee being very calm, gentle and focused. During the event, she had the right balance of interacting when needed and blending in to capture special moments when necessary. I loved the photos and videos -- her work shows that she really listened and understood the vibe we are going for. It brings me so much joy just looking through the intimate moments of our friends and the event she captured from that night. I would love to reach out to Sehee again for another project we may have in the future. She's a good find.

text: Sehee was amazing! She did such a great job with the photos, picking good spots and making myself and fiance feel comfortable. It was such a great experience and I would highly recommend working with her. You won't be disappointed!

text: Thank you so much Sehee for a great time. It was really fun to do this shoot with you despite a foggy and rainy Manhattan. I loved how we exchanged ideas and tried all sorts of things out. text: Many thanks to Sehee for a most enjoyable evening of photography. My daughter and I really enjoyed walking around the streets of Manhattan with you and taking pictures. You are very talented and we will be happy to recommend you to others.

text: Love Sehee. We had a fun time taking pic with her. She's so friendly and knowledgeable about the good spots for pics. Love all the pics - they're wonderful. For sure I will recommend her and maybe when we go back to NY, we may do another session with her.

text: I had the most amazing experience with Sehee! text: We wanted to take a moment to express our heartfelt gratitude for capturing the most incredible moments of our family vacation in Central Park. Sehee's talent behind the lens and ability to create such a comfortable and relaxed atmosphere truly made the entire experience unforgettable. From the moment we reached out to her internationally to make the reservation, she displayed exceptional professionalism and made the process seamless. We truly appreciate her attention to detail and willingness to accommodate our unique circumstances with parents, siblings, and even a small toddler. When the day of the photoshoot finally arrived, she exceeded our expectations in every way. Not only did she select the most picturesque spots in Central Park, but she also made sure that our entire family felt at ease in front of the camera. Her friendly and warm demeanor instantly put us all at ease, and it translated into genuine smiles and laughter captured in every photograph. Sehee has an incredible talent for capturing the essence and dynamics of our family. Each image is a treasure, and we will cherish them for years to come. The way she captured the joy, love, and connection between us is truly remarkable. These photographs have become a cherished memento of our family vacation, reminding us of the happiness we shared during that time.
